placeholder.title: More projects on the way
placeholder.text: I'm working on new projects that will be added soon.

ecocrop.description: Landing page that presents and communicates the features, goals, and benefits of EcoCrop as a digital solution for pest control and sustainable agriculture.

skillshare.description: Educational social networking application that connects students with similar academic interests, enabling study group creation, real-time collaboration, and resource sharing to enhance collaborative learning.

livria.description: Digital bookstore that allows users to purchase physical books, ebooks, and audiobooks, integrating a reader community where users can interact, chat, and share recommendations.

fym.description: Web application for exploring a catalog of movies and TV series. Details, trailers, cast information, scenes, distributors, and much more.

education.title: Education &
education.subtitle: My academic journey and continuous training in software engineering, security, and modern technologies.

ubiobio-2025.description: Specialized program in the Secure Software Development Life Cycle (SSDLC), focused on integrating security practices from requirements analysis to deployment and maintenance, applying DevSecOps principles.

mongodb-udemy-2024.description: Comprehensive MongoDB course focused on designing, querying, and optimizing NoSQL databases, covering fundamentals through advanced operations and data modeling.

mongodb-intro-2024.description: Introductory course providing MongoDB fundamentals, including document structure, collections, basic queries, and essential NoSQL database concepts.

scrum-2024.description: Certification in Scrum fundamentals focused on agile methodologies, roles, events, and artifacts, aimed at efficient software development project management.

upc-2023.description: Software Engineering degree focused on the design, development, and maintenance of technological solutions, with emphasis on software architecture, backend development, and mobile applications.

hacking-2022.description: Ethical Hacking course focused on vulnerability identification, penetration testing, and cybersecurity fundamentals, applying offensive techniques with a defensive mindset.

contact.title: Have a project in mind?
contact.subtitle: I'm available for new projects and collaborations. Feel free to reach out and let's work together on something amazing.

terminal.help:
Available commands:
  whoami    Display my identity
  status    List current projects
  about     Academic background info
  age       Birthday date
  pwd       Show current directory
  ls        List portfolio sections
  skills    Show technical skills
  projects  List featured projects
  education Show academic background
  contact   Display contact information
  social    Show social media links
  repo      Portfolio repository URL
  version   Show shell version
  uptime    Show elapsed session time
  uname     Display system information
  banner    Show ASCII art banner
  sudo      Try superuser privileges
  date      Show current date and time
  echo      Print a custom message (e.g., echo hello)
  cls/clear Clear command history
  exit      Close the interpreter
terminal.unknown:
'{cmd}' is not recognized as an internal or external command,
operable program or batch file.
Type 'help' to see available commands.
terminal.exit:
Interactive session ended. The interpreter has been safely closed.
You can reload the page to start a new session.
